_meta.sourceNote: Hand-curated from in-game observation + GGG patch notes. Game data is GGG IP under the fan-content policy. Each entry models ONE waystone affix slot — PoE 2 waystone affixes can roll multiple mod lines simultaneously, so `lines` is an array.

dataShape.lines: string[] — one or more mod text lines that roll together as a single affix slot. # is a number placeholder. Use the exact in-game text minus rolled values.
dataShape.regex: string | null — optional hand-curated unique-substring fragment (preferred for known combos). null = let the algorithmic fragment finder pick automatically.

knownGaps: v2 starter set is conservative — single-line entries dominate. Many real PoE 2 waystone affixes are 2-4 line combos that need verification before encoding.
Tier values + numeric ranges per affix not yet captured — required for tier-filtering UI and minimum-value regex.
0.5 Runes of Aldur will likely shift this pool — refresh after the 2026-05-21 patch notes drop.
Corrupted-only mods not yet split out as a separate band.
